75666041.title: Anthony Gordon (clinical scientist)
75666041.extract: Anthony Gordon  is a British clinician scientist and the Chair of Anaesthesia & Critical Care at Imperial College London and works as an intensive care consultant at Imperial College Healthcare NHS Trust.
